caption: In the video, a presenter is giving a talk in front of an audience, using a projected slide as a visual aid. The slide contains several phrases related to time, such as "You're wasting my time," "This gadget will save you hours," and "How do you spend your time these days?" The presenter, dressed in a black blazer over a white shirt, holds a tablet and gestures with her other hand while explaining the content. The audience member in the foreground is wearing a beanie and appears to be attentively listening. The background includes a book cover titled "Metaphors We Live By" by George Lakoff and Mark Johnson, suggesting that the presentation might be discussing metaphors or language usage related to time. The setting appears to be a professional or academic environment, possibly a conference or seminar.
